GUARDIAN-ACCELERATE.title: Accelerate
GUARDIAN-ACCELERATE.description: Reduce the turn counter of the right-most card in [gold]Stasis[/gold].
GUARDIAN-AGGRAVATE.title: Aggravate
GUARDIAN-AGGRAVATE.description: At the start of each combat, increase the energy cost of this card by {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
GUARDIAN-BRACE.title: Brace
GUARDIAN-BRACE.description: Reduce the HP loss required to trigger [gold]Mode Shift[/gold].
GUARDIAN-DEFENSIVE_MODE.title: Defensive Mode
GUARDIAN-DEFENSIVE_MODE.description:
[gold]Stance[/gold].
While in Defensive Mode you have [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold] and your [gold]Block[/gold] does not expire.
GUARDIAN-PACKAGE.title: Package
GUARDIAN-PACKAGE.description: A package has three cards inspired by a chosen Construct of the Spire.
GUARDIAN-POLISH.title: Polish
GUARDIAN-POLISH.description:
Reduce your [gold]Weak[/gold], [gold]Frail[/gold], and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] by X each.
Convert X stacks of temporary buffs into permanent buffs.
GUARDIAN-SOCKET.title: Socket
GUARDIAN-SOCKET.description: [gold]Gems[/gold] can be placed into this Socket at a Rest Site.
GUARDIAN-STASIS.title: Stasis
GUARDIAN-STASIS.description:
A card in [gold]Stasis[/gold] stays there for amount of turns equal to its cost plus [blue]1[/blue].
When it exits, it is returned to your [gold]Hand[/gold] and is free until played.
GUARDIAN-TICK.title: Tick
GUARDIAN-TICK.description: Tick effects activate whenever this card's [gold]Stasis[/gold] counter is reduced.
